mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_profile (user_id, job_category, tech_stacks, receive_time, daily_question_count, receive_days) VALUES (#{userId}, #{jobCategory}, #{techStacks}, #{receiveTime}, #{dailyQuestionCount}, #{receiveDays})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_profile SET job_category = #{jobCategory}, tech_stacks = #{techStacks}, receive_time = #{receiveTime}, daily_question_count = #{dailyQuestionCount}, receive_days = #{receiveDays} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, job_category, tech_stacks, receive_time, daily_question_count, receive_days FROM user_profile WHERE receive_time = #{receiveTime} OR receive_time = -1
